items.description:

The Arcade Party Y2K Sweater features an oversized silhouette covered in playful glitch graphics, smiley icons, anime-inspired visuals, and retro game energy on a clean black base.

Built for bold fits, baggy styling, and full Y2K expression.
Made to stand out and dominate every server.
